cases.prompt: 서비스 어디에 일관성 유지가 필요한지 확인하고 스키마 검증 프레임워크 만들어줘.

assertions.text: Classifies which parts need strict consistency (API responses, design tokens, error codes, config/ENV, i18n keys) vs flexible parts.
Produces consistency-rules.json specifying where consistency is enforced and the method (json-schema, tokens.json, enum, zod).
Adds an automated CI validation script with clear error messages on violation.

cases.prompt: Help me keep our API contracts and design tokens consistent across the service with schema validation.

assertions.text: Builds a JSON-schema-based consistency framework for API contracts and design tokens.
Marks API response shape and design tokens as strict (enforce: true) with their enforcement method.
Wires validation into boot or CI so drift is caught automatically.
